skillSlots.name: Spiritual Aura Surge
skillSlots.description: Attack the enemy with the highest ATK, dealing 300% ATK as Magic Damage, 100% chance to apply 4 stacks of [Disintegration]; simultaneously restore 3 Energy to [Holy Spirit].

skillSlots.name: Myriad Spirits Succumb to Stillness
skillSlots.description: Attack 4 random enemies, dealing 220% Magic Damage, and 100% chance to randomly distribute 8 stacks of [Disintegration] to hit targets; simultaneously restore 5 Energy to [Holy Spirit].

effects.name: Creation's Breath
effects.description: Summon [Holy Spirit] at the start of battle, and [Holy Spirit] unlocks the Normal Attack [Cloud Piercer].

effects.name: Creation's Breath
effects.description: When Nüwa is hit, 30% chance to restore 1 Energy to [Holy Spirit] (max 2 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Creation's Breath
effects.description: [Holy Spirit] gains 2 Energy and restores 15% of its max HP at the end of the turn, and dispels 3 debuffs from itself.

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: [Holy Spirit] takes 30% of the damage dealt to Nüwa; [Holy Spirit] gains 70% True Damage Reduction and Final Damage Reduction.

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: [Spiritual Aura Fluctuation] has no cooldown and deals an additional 10% of the target's current HP as True Damage (capped at 200% of Nüwa's ATK).

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description:
[Holy Spirit] unlocks the Ultimate Skill [Holy Spirit Garrote]; when [Holy Spirit] dies, Nüwa immediately casts an Ultimate Skill (this effect has a 4-turn cooldown).
[Holy Spirit Garrote]: When Energy is 5 or more, attack the enemy with the most [Disintegration] stacks, dealing 440% ATK as True Damage, and deal 200% ATK as True Damage to all other enemies; Nüwa and itself restore HP equal to 20% of the damage dealt. Then remove 5 Energy.

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: When Nüwa or [Holy Spirit] attacks enemies with [Disintegration], deal additional True Damage equal to 20% ATK × number of [Disintegration] stacks.

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: [Holy Spirit] inherits 160% of Nüwa's HP and Defense, and 100% of her other attributes. When Nüwa casts an Ultimate Skill, if [Holy Spirit] is already dead, resurrect [Holy Spirit] (this effect has a 4-turn cooldown).
